_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: Public-source review. Derived losslessly from the dossier data; nothing added.

timeline.event: Able.cz s.r.o. incorporated; Faraga and Melichárek registered as statutory officers.
Able acquires 100% of Blackfish studio; combined team ~60; stated further-acquisition intent.
Most recent change observed in the public register.
Court execution ordered against Tomáš Melichárek's personal Able.cz ownership stake over a 9,327.14 CZK debt to Dopravní podnik hl. m. Prahy, a.s.
That execution closed, satisfied by payment ('vymožením').
